NINJA_SLAYER_FEEDBACK_CONFIRM_BODY: This feedback will not be sent to MegaCrit. Your feedback text, current screenshot, and a game log archive will be uploaded to the NinjaSlayer mod author. Logs may contain device, save, and installed mod information.
